# CVMetalTexture

**Type Alias**

A reference to a CoreVideo Metal texture-based image buffer.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias CVMetalTexture = CVImageBuffer
```

## Discussion

To create and manage CoreVideo Metal textures, see [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/cvmetaltexturecache-q3j].
